channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Revolut Targets $150–$200 Billion Valuation Ahead of Planned IPO
item.description: British fintech company Revolut is positioning itself for a substantial valuation increase ahead of its eventual initial public offering (IPO). Sources cited by the Financial Times indicate that the n...

item.title: Former NFF President Galadima Passes Away
item.description: The Nigerian football community is in mourning following the passing of former Nigeria Football Federation (NFF) President, Alhaji Ibrahim Galadima. His death has triggered widespread tributes from sp...

item.title: Japan eases defence export rules to start selling warships and missiles abroad
item.description: Japan ne wale roz apni defence export rules mein sab se bara izlaah kia hai, jis se ab woh overseas warships, missiles aur dair dia doosre haathiyar bech sakta hai. Ye faisla Japan ke defence industri...

item.title: Supreme Court introduces SOPs to maintain judicial work during emergency public holidays
item.description: The Supreme Court of Pakistan has issued new standard operating procedures (SOPs) to make sure that judicial work continues smoothly even during unexpectedly declared public holidays. This move comes ...

item.title: What communities say reparations for slavery should involve: dignity, justice and recognition
item.description: This article explores the findings of the Guardian’s Legacies of Enslavement programme, a 10-year restorative justice initiative launched after research revealed the newspaper’s historical ties to tra...

item.title: Teenager admits to causing minor fire at Kenton synagogue
item.description: A 17-year-old boy from Brent, north-west London, has pleaded guilty to arson not endangering life following an attack on Kenton United Synagogue on Saturday night. The teenager, arrested by the Metrop...

item.title: Rivers Deputy Governor Highlights Baptist High School Legacy, Urges Focus on Discipline and Academic Excellence
item.description: Rivers State Deputy Governor, Prof. Ngozi Odu, during the reunion and award ceremony of Baptist High School Port Harcourt Old Students Association, highlighted the school's rich legacy and called for ...

item.title: Practical and Luxurious Mother's Day Gift Ideas for Moms of Active Toddlers

item.title: X Factor finalist appears in court facing attempted murder charge
item.description: A former contestant of the popular television show X Factor has appeared in court facing serious charges of attempted murder. During the court proceedings, the individual reportedly made a heart-shape...

item.title: Starmer's Leadership Under Scrutiny Following Mandelson Appointment Controversy

item.title: Ex-Health Undersecretary Denies Role in Promoting Controversial Dengvaxia Vaccine Purchase

item.title: Primark plans demerger to strengthen business after recent challenges
item.description: Primark, the well-known retail company, is reportedly planning a demerger to optimize its business operations following several disruptive events that have affected its performance. The company aims t...

item.title: Shaun Murphy criticises spectator after disruption during World Snooker Championship match
item.description: Shaun Murphy publicly criticised a spectator after being distracted by a comment during his first-round match against Fan Zhengyi at the World Snooker Championship in Sheffield. The incident occurred ...

item.title: Cabinet tensions rise over Mandelson appointment amid Starmer scrutiny
item.description: Cabinet tensions have escalated as Keir Starmer faces criticism over the appointment of Peter Mandelson as US ambassador, despite the lack of security clearance. Sir Olly Robbins, the former Foreign O...

item.title: Eight Lawmakers Defect from Parties in Latest Political Shift
item.description: On April 21, 2026, a total of eight members of the Nigerian House of Representatives officially defected from their political parties to join new ones. The defections were announced during the plenary...

item.title: NASA Astronaut Captures Earth Setting Behind the Moon Using iPhone
item.description: NASA astronaut Reid Wiseman, commander of the Artemis II mission, posted an extraordinary video taken with an iPhone showing the Earth disappearing behind the Moon, an event known as 'Earthset.' The v...

item.title: Erwin Ken Parchaso Reflects on 10-Year Journey to Top the Physicians Licensure Exam
item.description: Erwin Ken Parchaso, a graduate of Lyceum-Northwestern University in Dagupan City, was the topnotcher of the March 2026 Physicians Licensure Examination. His name was initially listed as “name withheld...

item.title: NEET PG 2026: Tentative Exam Date, Registration Process and Eligibility Criteria
item.description: The article explains key details about the NEET PG 2026 postgraduate medical entrance exam. The National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS) has indicated that NEET PG 2026 is tentativel...

item.title: Bihar Women's Panel Issues Notice Over Pappu Yadav's Remarks on Women's Participation in Politics
item.description: Independent MP Pappu Yadav's controversial remarks about the political and social status of women in India have drawn sharp criticism and attention. Speaking about the recently defeated women’s reserv...
